allow:
Bash(cd "C:/Users/kypin/Documents/KAM_Sentinel" && .venv/Scripts/python -m PyInstaller \\
  --name "KAM_Sentinel" \\
  --onefile \\
  --noconsole \\
  --icon "kam_sentinel.ico" \\
  --add-data "dashboard.html;." \\
  --add-data "thresholds.py;." \\
  --add-data "kam_sentinel.ico;." \\
  --hidden-import flask \\
  --hidden-import psutil \\
  --hidden-import wmi \\
  --hidden-import GPUtil \\
  launch.py 2>&1)
Bash(cd /c/Users/kypin/Documents/KAM_Sentinel && git push origin main && git tag v1.4.0 && git push origin v1.4.0 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/kypin/Documents/KAM_Sentinel && git add dashboard.html && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add What's New! first-run walkthrough for v1.4.0

6-step modal walkthrough shown once per version \(localStorage key
'kam_whats_new_seen'\). Covers: 404 fix, cross-platform support, lean
rewrite, anonymous telemetry, proactive error tracking, Phase 1 complete.

Skip button on every step, dots navigation, GOT IT to dismiss on final
step. Auto-shows 1.2s after dashboard loads, never shown again for same
version.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/kypin/Documents/KAM_Sentinel && git add server.py dashboard.html launch.py version.json build_exe.bat && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
v1.4.2: Final release — version strings synced, 64/64 tests

Bump all version strings to 1.4.2 so compiled binary VER matches
version.json on main \(prevents false update notification on fresh install\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && git tag v1.4.2 && git push origin v1.4.2 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/kypin/Documents/KAM_Sentinel && git add server.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix macOS CI: catch all exceptions in api_diagnostics GPU check

GPUtil.getGPUs\(\) raises OSError \(not ImportError\) when nvidia-smi is
missing on macOS. Bare except ImportError let the exception leak to Flask,
returning 500 and failing the section 10 test on the macOS CI runner.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && git tag v1.4.3 && git push origin v1.4.3 2>&1)
Bash(cd /c/Users/kypin/Documents/KAM_Sentinel && git diff --name-only && git stash && git rebase origin/main 2>&1)
